meaning: v.反射,反映,表现,反省,细想
examples: We should all give ourselves time to reflect.
The third-quarter results reflect continued improvements in productivity.
Such attitudes are valueless unless they reflect inner cognition and certainty.
He says Moscow's actions reflect a historical inability to find a place in the international community.
If the client expresses that worry, the portfolio will be adjusted to reflect it, says Shawn P.
